channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: RX 9070 GPU could theoretically be an RTX 5070 killer, I’m just worried that AMD may not go for Nvidia’s throat with pricing
item.description: AMD’s RX 9070 XT could outgun Nvidia’s RTX 5070 Ti easily, and come within 10% of the RTX 5080 GPU, if fresh rumors prove correct.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: AI agents are proving remarkably popular - but firms still face a host of challenges
item.description: Most European businesses have or will use AI agents to tackle increasing IT workloads and boost efficiency.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Marvel Rivals crosshairs: how to change and import them
item.description: Here's everything you need to know about Marvel Rivals crosshairs. This includes info on how to change your crosshairs, as well as the best crosshairs codes to use depending on your play style.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: I was excited by Netflix’s Black Doves renewal, but Ben Whishaw’s disappointing season 2 update means we likely won't see it this year
item.description: I was excited to hear that Black Doves had been renewed, but Ben Whishaw's season 2 update has left me disappointed.
item.dc:creator: grace.morris@futurenet.com (Grace Morris), TechRadar

item.title: Fragmented cybersecurity is costing businesses billions, and putting them at risk
item.description: IBM report reveals how platformization can help businesses reduce costs and improve their security postures.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Mercadona Invests in Digital Excellence with €250M Plan
item.description: Mercadona, the Spanish retail giant, is investing in digital excellence with a €250 million plan to improve internal operations and customer experience.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Prime Video will get a big movie boost with new Lionsgate movies, and as a thriller fan it makes the service a must-have
item.description: Amazon and Lionsgate have reached an exclusive deal for 2026, and some 2025 movies will come along too.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: US cyber agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Christina A. Cassidy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The Nothing Phone 3a series is confirmed for March 4, and a photo and specs rumor gives us an idea of what to expect
item.description: The Nothing Phone 3a is landing on March 4, possibly alongside the 3a Pro, and a hands-on photo gives us a glimpse at one of these devices.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How DeepSeek will upend the AI industry
item.description: Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s cost-saving techniques for training and delivering generative AI (genAI) models could democratize the entire industry by lowering entry barriers for new AI companies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The cloud infrastructure that’s redefining management at Guzmán Minerals
item.description: Since its founding in 1939, family-owned business group Guzmán Global has been dedicated to covering sectors such as minerals and food ingredients, both nationally and internationally.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Alibaba introduces Qwen 2.5-Max AI model, claims edge over DeepSeek
item.description: China’s Alibaba Group has launched an upgraded version of its Qwen 2.5 AI model, claiming it outperforms models from DeepSeek, OpenAI, and Meta, as competition in the AI market intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How execs can bridge the AI knowledge gap
item.description: From streamlining administrative tasks to enhancing brainstorming sessions, AI is becoming an essential workplace companion. Yet, despite its transformative promise, its integration isn’t as simple as flipping a switch.
item.dc:creator: Dave Grow, Fast Company

item.title: There are two new ways to stream Apple's MLS Season Pass this year, plus more content to take in and a new way to get it for free
item.description: Apple's rolling out two new ways to watch MLS Season Pass, a bunch of new content, including an entirely new show, and T-Mobile customers once again get free access.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Meta agrees to pay $25 million to settle lawsuit from Trump after Jan. 6 suspension
item.description: Meta has agreed to pay $25 million to settle a lawsuit filed by President Donald Trump against the company after it suspended his accounts following the Jan. 6, 2021, attack on the Capitol.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller And Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The rise of ‘influencer voice’: Why this TikTok creator accent is taking over the internet and maybe the world
item.description: The “influencer accent” is taking over TikTok. If you don’t know what I’m talking about, scroll through your FYP page and listen.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Verizon brings AI suite to enterprise infrastructure customers
item.description: Verizon Business has launched AI Connect, an integrated suite of products designed to let businesses deploy generative artificial intelligence (AI) workloads at scale.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to make sure you’ve got the cybersecurity people you need
item.description: The government's personnel shop has devised a five-part strategy for planning, hiring and retaining cybersecurity people. But not everyone follows the strategy. The post How to make sure you’ve got the cybersecurity people you need first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025
item.description: Last year was an eventful one on the cybersecurity front. But big cyber developments in the federal scape are expected in 2025. The post Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: DeepSeek underscores US-China race for AI dominance, OpenAI says
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity
item.description: Digital identity advocates are calling on Trump administration to boost the use of mobile drivers licenses and other digital identity verification use cases. The post Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: UnitedHealth cyberattack exposes 190 million in largest US healthcare data breach
item.description: The number of people affected by a UnitedHealth data breach in February 2024 was actually higher than previously reported and was the largest medical data breach in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The AI bust is here
item.description: Hands up! Who remembers the dot.com bust? I do. It was March 10, 2000. The NASDAQ Composite index peaked at 5,048.62 points. That doesn’t sound like much today, but it was up 800% from 1995. Then people started to get nervous about the true value of the dot.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump’s 100% tariff threat on Taiwan chips raises cost, supply chain fears
item.description: President Donald Trump has suggested plans to impose tariffs of up to 100% on semiconductors imported from Taiwan, aiming to boost US manufacturing but risking higher costs and supply chain disruptions for tech firms and enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Quest for Slim Docker Images: Exploring Four Lightweight Base Images
item.description: Discover the world of slim Docker images with our guide to four lightweight base images, plus a bonus repository of experiments.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Doing authentication right
item.description: Any substantial website is going to need to customize itself for individual users. Thus, it is going to have to authenticate those users — that is, let them log in. As a software developer, it is your job to make the whole process as smooth and secure as possible.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump asks Musk to 'go get' NASA astronauts stuck in space
item.description: President Trump said Tuesday that he “asked Elon Musk and @SpaceX to ‘go get’ the 2 brave astronauts who have been virtually abandoned in space.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Unknown threat actor targeting Juniper routers with backdoor: Report
item.description: Network administrators using routers from Juniper Networks are being urged to scan for possible compromise after the discovery that an unknown threat actor has been installing a backdoor in customer routers since at least 2023.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DeepSeek triggers shock waves for AI giants, but the disruption won’t last
item.description: Chinese start-up DeepSeek rocked the tech industry Monday after the company’s new generative AI (genAI) bot hit Apple’s App Store and Google Play Store and downloads almost immediately exceeded those of OpenAI’s ChatGPT.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Disabling, narrowing Apple Intelligence is just a few swipes away
item.description: A suite of artificial intelligence features is enabled automatically with Monday’s release of iOS 18.3.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: Prompt Security adds code sanitization, data leak prevention for GitHub Copilot
item.description: Prompt Security has announced an upgrade to its security and governance platform for GitHub Copilot and other AI coding assistants.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Spain's leader wants the EU to ‘make social media great again.’ Here's how
item.description: DAVOS, Switzerland (AP) — Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez is launching a crusade against what he sees as the downsides of social media.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON and JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, Fox 5
